name: Change package name
description: Appends ".morphe" to the package name by default. Changing the package name of the app can lead to unexpected issues.

options.title: Package name
options.description: The name of the package to rename the app to.

options.title: Update permissions
options.description: Update compatibility receiver permissions. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers
options.description: Update provider names declared by the app. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

options.title: Update providers strings
options.description: Update additional provider names declared by the app in the strings.xml file. Enabling this can fix installation errors, but this can also break features in certain apps.

name: Discord Rich Presence
description: Displays the currently playing track on your Discord profile.

name: Scrobbling
description: Adds options to add played tracks to Last.fm and ListenBrainz.
